transcript: Speaker A: আমি গরিব হয়ে... I am broke. [I am broke... I am broke.] Speaker B: I am broke. Speaker A: আজ আমি পারছি না। I can't today. [I can't do it today. I can't today.] Speaker B: I can't today. Speaker A: আমি গণ্ডগোল করে ফেলেছি। I messed up. [I have messed up. I messed up.] Speaker B: I messed up. Speaker A: আমি শেষ। I am done. [I am finished. I am done.] Speaker B: I am done. Speaker A: আমি বিভ্রান্ত। I am confused. [I am confused. I am confused.] Speaker B: I am confused. Speaker A: আমার একটু বিরতি দরকার। I need a break. [I need a break. I need a break.] Speaker B: I need a break. Speaker A: MySivi অ্যাপে আমার সাথে এভাবেই বাংলায় কথা বলে ইংরেজি শিখুন। তাও শুধু ১ টাকায়। আমার সাথে যখন ইচ্ছে, যতক্ষণ ইচ্ছে প্র্যাকটিস করুন। বলা, গ্রামার, বাক্য গঠন, ঠিক শব্দ ব্যবহার, সব এক জায়গায়। [Learn English by speaking in Bengali with me on the MySivi app. That too for only 1 rupee. Practice with me whenever you want, for as long as you want. Speaking, grammar, sentence construction, correct word usage, all in one place.]
on_screen_text: Ami gorib hoye [I am broke], I am broke, Aaj ami parchhi [I can't today], I can't today, I messed up, Ami shesh [I am done], I am done, I am confused, I need a break, MySivi, amar sathe emonbhabei [just like this with me], Banglay kotha [speaking in Bengali], tao shudhu 1 takay [that too for only 1 rupee], MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: The ad showcases the MySivi app where a Bengali-speaking user practices English translations with an AI avatar. It highlights features like grammar, speaking, and sentence construction practice for just 1 rupee. The video ends with a call to install the app.
